method_matrix.title: The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery
method_matrix.method: The AI Scientist generates novel research ideas, writes code, executes experiments, visualizes results, writes full scientific papers, and runs a simulated review process in an automated, iterative fashion.
method_matrix.best_result: Papers exceeding acceptance threshold at a top machine learning conference

method_matrix.title: The AI Scientist-v2: Workshop-Level Automated Scientific Discovery via Agentic Tree Search
method_matrix.method: Extends automated scientific discovery with stronger search and review-like iteration, motivating stricter gates for novelty, experiment quality, and paper readiness.

method_matrix.title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
method_matrix.method: Describes agentic research assistance across literature review, experimentation, and report writing, highlighting the need for human oversight and reproducibility controls.

method_matrix.title: MLE-bench: Evaluating Machine Learning Agents on Machine Learning Engineering
method_matrix.method: Created a benchmark using Kaggle competitions to evaluate ML agents on real-world ML engineering tasks, using human baselines from Kaggle leaderboards and open-source agent scaffolds.
method_matrix.best_result: OpenAI's o1-preview with AIDE scaffolding achieved at least the level of a Kaggle bronze medal in 16.9% of competitions.

method_matrix.title: AIBuildAI-2: Scalable Agentic AI Research and Engineering
method_matrix.method: AIBuildAI-2 is a knowledge-enhanced agent with an external, evolving knowledge system for automatically building AI models, featuring a hierarchical organization of curated AI development knowledge with dynamic context loading.

method_matrix.title: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
method_matrix.method: Uses verbal feedback and memory to help agents improve across trials, motivating explicit failure memory and revision loops.

method_matrix.title: Self-Refine: Iterative Refinement with Self-Feedback
method_matrix.method: Studies iterative generation, feedback, and refinement, providing background for reviewer-style critique and revision policies.

method_matrix.title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
method_matrix.method: Demonstrates open-ended skill acquisition with memory and iterative exploration, relevant to long-running agent loops and durable lessons.

method_matrix.title: AgentBench: Evaluating LLMs as Agents
method_matrix.method: Introduces agent evaluation tasks and motivates structured benchmarks for agent behavior rather than isolated text quality.

method_matrix.title: SWE-agent: Agent-Computer Interfaces Enable Automated Software Engineering
method_matrix.method: Shows how agents can operate computer interfaces to solve software tasks, relevant to local experiment execution and reproducible command logs.
